# An Interactive Constraint-Based Decision-Support Tool for Pharmaceutical Formulation Development

## Overview

This repository contains an interactive Shiny application for supporting pharmaceutical formulation development through a hierarchical, constraint-based decision process.

The tool allows users to explore formulation pathways by interacting with a decision graph in which selections and answers dynamically influence feasible downstream options. It is intended as a research prototype for structured exploration, testing, and demonstration of formulation strategy development.

## Main Features

- interactive graph-based exploration of formulation pathways
- hierarchical decision logic with constrained downstream progression
- dynamic user interaction through questions and answers
- visualization of feasible formulation routes
- administrative interface for managing and editing the underlying decision structure

## Running the Application Locally

The application is structured as a Shiny app using `ui.R` and `server.R`.

To run the app locally in R or RStudio:

```r
shiny::runApp()
